trigger.description: Workspace hygiene could not pass .beads/issues.jsonl bytes to the Beads-state classifier, so conflict-marker and parse-error detection are skipped. This typically happens when the JSONL is unreadable (permission denied, disk error, transient race) or when the caller elected not to read the file.
setup_commands: # In a temporary workspace, remove read permission on .beads/issues.jsonl before invoking workspace hygiene

repair_strings: Ensure .beads/issues.jsonl is readable by the agent so hygiene can scan it for conflict markers.
Re-run hygiene after restoring read access to the JSONL export.
